title: Why We Fight
writer: Julius J. Epstein, Robert Heller, Williband Hentschel
actors: Walter Huston, Victor Bulwer-Lytton, Kai-Shek Chiang
plot: The official World War II US Government film statement defining the various enemies of the Allies and why they must be fought.
language: English, German, Italian, Japanese, Amharic, Russian
